home.hero_subtitle_1: A reading support tool for everyone.
home.benefits_title: Why learning with DyslexiaBuddy is awesome?
home.benefit_1_desc: Early detection of reading difficulties helps provide timely and effective support.
home.benefit_2_desc: Personalized learning paths, suited to your unique learning style.
home.benefit_3_desc: Make progress every day, read aloud boldly, and be more confident in learning!

about.title: About DyslexiaBuddy ✍️
about.intro: DyslexiaDetect is a modern web application designed to provide early dyslexia screening through interactive games.
about.team_prefix: This project is developed by a student team from
about.school: Ho Chi Minh City University of Technology (HCMUT)
about.mission_desc: We aim to provide an accessible, friendly, and accurate tool that supports users of all ages in recognizing early signs of dyslexia.

footer.slogan: Helping every child become a reading star!
footer.copyright: Dyslexia Buddy · Created with ❤️ for children across Vietnam

dashboard.title: My Tests
dashboard.training_desc: Practice with games to improve reading and listening skills!
dashboard.no_sessions: No test sessions found. Start your first test!

training.title: 🎮 Training Zone
training.subtitle: Choose a game to practice reading and listening skills. The more you play, the better you'll get!

benefits.brain_desc: Games help the brain develop reading skills
benefits.fun_desc: Learning through games helps kids love reading more

games.game_1_desc: Listen to clues, type the word, and help the bee collect honey.
games.game_2_desc: Read each statement and guide the robot to the right lane.
games.game_4_desc: Find the target letter among easy-to-confuse letters.

instruction.title: Spelling Bee: Honey Garden
instruction.desc: Listen to the pronunciation, read the description, and type the word you hear to help the bee collect honey and bloom the garden.
instruction.typing_rule: You can type without accents. The system automatically removes accents and extra spaces when checking.
instruction.encouragement: Try to keep a correct streak so the bee flies smoothly across the garden.

game.question: Question
game.hint_rule: You can type without accents. Listen to the audio, read the hints, and guide the bee to the next flower.
game.feedback_right: Correct, one more drop of honey!

instruction.title: Robot Delivery: Fact Checker
instruction.desc: Read each statement and guide the robot to the TRUE or FALSE lane to deliver the package.
instruction.step_1: Carefully read the information package on the screen.
instruction.step_2: Select the TRUE LANE if the statement is a fact.
instruction.step_3: Select the FALSE LANE if the statement is incorrect.
instruction.encouragement: The goal is to read quickly, choose the right lane, and deliver all 5 packages.

game.feedback_right_msg: Correct. Robot delivered the package safely.
game.feedback_wrong_msg: Incorrect. Robot must return to the station.
game.feedback_idle: Select TRUE or FALSE lane for this package.
game.log_empty: Robot is waiting for the first package.

instruction.title: Magic Tree
instruction.step_1: Look at the illustration and listen to the sound of the word.
instruction.step_2: Select the letters on the screen to fill in the blanks correctly.
instruction.step_3: Each correct answer helps your Magic Tree grow!

instruction.title: Letter Meteor Station
instruction.desc: Help the spaceship find the correct letter among the jamming meteors. Look closely because many letters have very similar shapes.
instruction.step_2: Look at the target letter on the right panel, then select the meteor with the exact same letter.
instruction.step_3: Some letters are easy to confuse like b/d/p/q, a/ă/â, o/ô/ơ. Observe slowly and carefully.
instruction.encouragement: Each correct answer will save a meteor and help the spaceship complete its mission.

game.question: Question
game.log_empty: Results for each turn will appear here.
game.feedback_right: Correct. The meteor has been saved.
game.feedback_idle: Look closely at the confusing letters before choosing.
